items.title: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your resp…
items.title_zh: 顺便说一句，这非常有效，在您的查询结束时，请您的LLM“构建您的响应......
items.description: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More…
items.description_zh: 顺便说一句，这非常有效，在查询结束时，请您的LLM“将您的响应构建为 HTML”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还成功要求LLM以幻灯片等形式展示其输出。更多...
